title: 20 Translation Thread
wikitext:
[]: 2.0 Translation Thread             Quote Post by Tab » Mon Jul 06, 2009 5:37 pm As some of you may already know, very soon many people will have seen the final act of 2.0 while not necessarily having seen the rest. If you would like to, append the abbreviation of the word "camera" to the initialism "roe2", then search for the resulting string in a popular search engine. This thread is for discussion of the final act, and also to launch the Rebuild of Evangelion 2 With AnnotateD English (or roe2wade) project: [url]http://roe2wade.command-q.org[/url] Here's an ongoing transcription by 2chan Here is a rough translation of the ending by ear from a non-member (Aenigma on Rizon): 15:00 Rei: "It's okay, I can just live here now." Shinji: "Nah I'm gonna help you" 16:00 Ritsuko: Something about disabling self destruct and going into a divine form and making energy in this form, and it only lives for that purpose. 18:00 Fuyutsuki: "Their bond is very strong" 18:50 Shinji: "Thanks, regarding my dad." Rei: "Sorry I couldn't do anything." Shinji: "It's okay like this." 19:10 Mari: "Now I see how it was... The smell was different" 20:00 Ritsuko: "The angel's dead. It's like 15 years ago. Third Impact is going to start. The world is going to end." Credits 25:30 Misato: "What the fuck is that?" Kaworu: "It's the promised time, Shinji. At last, I'll make you experience paradise."

[]: Re: Last act of 2.0 (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Evafan » Tue Jul 07, 2009 12:18 am LiLi wrote: ... This time (koso= for sure, added for emphasis), I will make you, at least, happy..."

[]: Re: Last act of 2.0 (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by felineki » Tue Jul 07, 2009 3:10 am Tab wrote: Regarding the music: LiLi wrote: The title is "Tsubasa wo kudasai" ( Give Me Wings ) - a song published by folk group Akai Tori in 1971, I think.

[]:             Quote Post by Duskbyday » Tue Jul 07, 2009 3:19 am It was 1 epic ending, is it me or can there be more than 1 version of 3rd impact depending on the situation and who merges with who.

[]: Re: Last act of 2.0 (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by mastervampire » Tue Jul 07, 2009 4:06 am Tab wrote: This time (koso= for sure, added for emphasis), I will make you, at least, happy

[]: Re: Last act of 2.0 (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by LiLi » Tue Jul 07, 2009 4:21 am This time (koso= for sure, added for emphasis), I will make you, at least, happy. I said this in the spoilers thread, but I think it's worth repeating here - I suppose it *could* also be taken to mean "now". I also suppose the ambiguity could be taken to mean Director Anno is trolling us. To keep us busy, you know. BTW, I think there are other bits I translated from the part before the ED credits in the Spoilers thread, if anyone wants to take a look, but I don't have time to go hunt for them right now. Also, I need coffee. Else brain sense make not does.

[]: Re: Last act of 2.0 (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Tab » Tue Jul 07, 2009 4:50 am LiLi wrote: I said this in the spoilers thread, but I think it's worth repeating here - I suppose it *could* also be taken to mean "now".

[]: Re: Last act of 2.0 (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Tue Jul 07, 2009 8:17 am Tab wrote: My friend shat the same bricks everyone else did when I repeated the line to him as "This time". I explained it this way: There's an ambiguity as to whether the implication is "This time around " or " At this time", which drastically changes the meaning from "this has happened in the past and is recurring" to "this is something that's happening right now".

[]: Re: Last act of 2.0 (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Tab » Tue Jul 07, 2009 8:38 am I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Doesn't Kaworu say something along the lines of "that Ikari kid is always trouble" at the end of 1.0, anyway? I think that, if it's not a direct sequel to EoE, there's at least some sort of overall recurring cycle going on in this AU.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Jul 07, 2009 8:46 am Gah. Everytime I think of theory to explain this, I keep finding holes in it.

[]: Re: Last act of 2.0 (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Tue Jul 07, 2009 9:27 am Tab wrote: Take it to the sequel theory thread, this is solely for discussing the finale of 2.0 and possible translations.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Tue Jul 07, 2009 10:54 am Yah know just for the record, I thought I should have been freaked out by LiLis display picture. But it seems a hell of a lot more right than wrong..Damn Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Tab » Tue Jul 07, 2009 11:06 am Ok, r2w website is complete for the time being and works in Firefox 3.5 and WebKit-based browsers such as Safari and Chrome (other browsers not tested, the site relies heavily on HTML5). Will add functionality as necessary, but for the small amount of work that we do have, this will suffice and hopefully serve to generate interest.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Tue Jul 07, 2009 11:09 am wonderluster wrote: Yah know just for the record, I thought I should have been freaked out by LiLis display picture. But it seems a hell of a lot more right than wrong..Damn Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Tue Jul 07, 2009 11:22 am When I watched the camrip and saw Unit 01 going berserk,I thought Misato was begging Shinji to stop.Didnt think she would cheer him on.That was a suprise.

[]:             Quote Post by RockManBalls » Tue Jul 07, 2009 4:15 pm I like the google translation; it reminds me of that episode of Star Trek: TNG where Picard is stranded with that alien dude who talks in metaphor. The Darmok and Jalad guy: Shinji and Rei at Geofrontgra. Ritsuko, when the walls fell. Unit-01, his arms wide.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 07, 2009 5:03 pm RockManBalls wrote: it reminds me of that episode of Star Trek: TNG where Picard is stranded with that alien dude who talks in metaphor. (snip)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 07, 2009 6:34 pm Reichu wrote: After looking over the scene some more, I'm edging this way, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Tab » Tue Jul 07, 2009 7:24 pm Thanks Reichu, I added your more comprehensible translation (Aenigma isn't a follower of the series so what I got from him I had to essentially reinterpret myself in the context of the series). Keep them coming and if anyone can translate don't forget to do the join thing on the website (though you guys know my contact info anyhow, and that's basically where the join exercises lead). Edit: Annotations may also now be classed <dd>s rather than only <aside>s. This allows for gists and summaries to replace dialogue until we have real dialogue (most of Ritsuko).

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Tue Jul 07, 2009 9:21 pm Reichu wrote: they added a line about Angels having the Fruit of Life and us having the Fruit of Knowledge to 1.11. So this might mean that Eva-01 has something other than "AYANAMIIIIII!!!" to gain from Zeruel's core -- the Fruit of Life, whether it's still a spiral-thingy or something completely different this time around. (Kudos to Otakon for his persistence that Eva-01 gained something from Zeruel.)
